6:
WITH min_total AS (
    SELECT MIN(total) AS min_total
    FROM (
        SELECT y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND y.Date LIKE '2013%'
        GROUP BY y.CustomerID
    )
),
selected AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND y.Date LIKE '2013%'
    GROUP BY y.CustomerID, c.Segment
    HAVING SUM(y.Consumption) = (SELECT min_total FROM min_total)
)
SELECT
    (AVG(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN total END) -
     AVG(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN total END)) AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (AVG(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN total END) -
     AVG(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN total END)) AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (AVG(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN total END) -
     AVG(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN total END)) AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM selected;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT Segment,
       pct_increase,
       CASE
         WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pct_increase DESC) = 1 THEN 'Highest'
         ELSE 'Lowest'
       END AS Rank
FROM (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', t.Date) = '2013' THEN t.Amount * t.Price ELSE 0 END) -
            SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', t.Date) = '2012' THEN t.Amount * t.Price ELSE 0 END))
           / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', t.Date) = '2012' THEN t.Amount * t.Price ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100.0
           AS pct_increase
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
      AND strftime('%Y', t.Date) IN ('2012', '2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment
) sub
WHERE Rank IN ('Highest', 'Lowest')
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
